title: ANIIMS Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Infection Control Nurse, Data Manager Posts
description: The Andaman and Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies of 02 Infection Control Nurse and Data Manager Jobs. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.Sc Nursing, any degree, and a diploma can apply for the ANIIMS Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have ...
